solutions.solution: (d) According to the question, the direction diagram is as follows. [FIGURE: Square diagram showing points P, Q, R, S with 5km distances and compass directions N, E, S, W] Hence, Q lies North of S.
(d) According to the question, the direction diagram is as follows [FIGURE: Diagram showing points D, M, A, K with compass directions] Hence, K is towards South-East of town D.

(a) According to the question, the direction diagram is as follows [FIGURE: Path diagram showing journey from starting point A through points B, C, D with distances and turns] CD = OB = 2 km, OC = BD = 3 km, AO = 5 km. Required distance, AB = AO + OB = 5 + 2 = 7 km
(a) According to the question, the direction diagram is as follows [FIGURE: Simple diagram with points A, B, C and distances] Clearly, A started from West
(c) According to the question, the direction diagram is as follows [FIGURE: Complex path diagram with multiple points and directions] Clearly, the direction of P is South-East in respect of M.

(b) According to the question, the direction diagram is as follows [FIGURE: Diagram showing Home, Market, Crossing, Park, Office complex with compass directions] Clearly, market is to West of crossing
(a) [FIGURE: Linear arrangement showing Bopni, Kokran, Akram, Tokhada, Paranda with compass directions] Clearly, Bopni is the farthest West.

(c) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows [FIGURE: Complex path diagram with calculations] Now, AX = DB = BY = CA = 5 km, XD = CY = 5 km, XC = XA + AC = 5 + 5 = 10 km. Distance between C and D, i.e., CD = √(XD)² + (XC)² (by Pythagoras theorem) = √5² + 10² = √25 + 100 = √125 = 5√5 = 5 × 2.23 = 11.15 km. So, it is clear from the figure that the houses of C and D are less than 20 km apart
(d) It is clear that as the window faces East, the direction of the walls face on which the sunshine falls is towards East. But the outside of this wall faces in the opposite direction i.e., West.
(d) According to the question, the direction diagram will be as follows. [FIGURE: Path diagram with points A, B, C, D and distances] Now, AB = CD = 30 km, BC = AD = 4 km. Required distance, AD = 4 km
